title: FE-10 - Implementation Map For Current Codebase
description: Map truc tiep FE-10 vao codebase Modular Monolith hien tai. Muc tieu la build API synchronous, upload generated files qua Storage, reuse `TestReport` + `CoverageMetric`, va khong pha boundary giua TestReporting, TestExecution, va Storage.

techStack.architecture: Modular Monolith (CQRS via Dispatcher, IRepository<T,Guid>, schema isolation, cross-module contracts)

missingForFe10: Cross-module report read gateway de assemble full run report context

usageForFe10: Lay endpoint metadata cho ordered endpoint scope de tinh coverage by-method, by-tag, va uncovered paths
Download report binary cho report route
CSV renderer can reuse existing CsvHelper dependency already in infrastructure graph

moduleStructure.description: Khong tao module moi. Chi them contract gateway o Contracts/TestExecution, implementation o TestExecution, va API/runtime/render surface trong TestReporting.

addedFiles.description: Cross-module DTO gom suite access, run summary, recent history, ordered definitions, va actual run results.
Read gateway contract tu TestExecution sang TestReporting.
Gateway implementation doc TestRun + distributed cache payload + execution context + recent history.
POST generate report, GET list/get metadata, GET download.
CQRS command + handler tao report/export on demand.
List reports for one run.
Get one report metadata.
Download one report file via Storage gateway.
API request model cho FE-10.
API response model cho report metadata.
Structured coverage summary response model.
Internal structured document model duoc cac renderer consume.
Internal render result contract gom content stream, file name, content type, va file category.
History limit, body preview limit, va retention options cho FE-10.
Top-level report generator contract.
Pipeline: gateway context -> sanitize -> coverage -> renderer -> storage upload -> metadata persistence.
Coverage calculation contract.
Compute suite-scoped coverage percentages and uncovered paths.
Sensitive-data masking contract for exports.
Mask headers, variables, and truncate previews before rendering.
Format renderer strategy contract.
HTML -> PDF renderer using existing `IConverter`.
Render HTML report using existing `IRazorLightEngine` and inline template.
Serialize structured report model to JSON.
Flatten report data to CSV using existing CsvHelper dependency.

modifiedFiles.change: Register FE-10 services and renderer strategies.
Add optional local overrides cho retention/history/preview settings neu host dang dung file nay.

unchangedFiles: ClassifiedAds.Migrator/ - no new migration files for FE-10 v1.
ClassifiedAds.Background/ - no host registration changes trong synchronous v1.
Entities/TestReport.cs - reuse current report metadata shape.
Entities/CoverageMetric.cs - reuse current coverage storage shape.

notes: Chi tiet run van nam trong distributed cache cua FE-07/08; FE-10 khong duoc thay doi storage pattern do.
Coverage snapshot chi la persisted aggregate strings/percentages trong `CoverageMetric`, khong can bang moi.

mandatory: TestRunReportReadGatewayService chi duoc deserialize 1 cache payload moi request generate report.
Khong duoc query per-test-case endpoint metadata.
Cho v1, duoc phep goi `GetExecutionContextAsync(testSuiteId, null)` mot lan va map testCaseId trong memory.
Recent run history phai `Take()` voi limit ro rang.
forbidden: TestReporting doc IDistributedCache truc tiep bang RedisKey cua TestRun.
TestReporting doc StorageDbContext truc tiep de upload/download file.
Them Background worker hoac queue export vao FE-10 v1.
Them migration chi de luu report options.

flows.name: Generate Report
steps: 2. Handler load report context qua ITestRunReportReadGatewayService va validate owner.
4. Generator sanitize -> load endpoint metadata -> calculate coverage -> render file.
5. Generator upload file qua Storage gateway, upsert CoverageMetric, create TestReport row.

flows.name: List And Get Report Metadata
steps: 3. Query handler read TestReport metadata trong testreporting schema va map response.

flows.name: Download Report File
steps: 2. Query handler validate owner va load TestReport metadata.

qualityGates: Khong them migration, entity, hoac DbSet moi.
Khong direct reference TestExecution repositories or cache tu TestReporting.
Khong ghi raw secrets vao exported headers, extracted variables, hoac response body preview.
Khong implement background queue worker trong pass nay.
Khong them dependency PDF/CSV stack moi khi repo da co san infrastructure utilities.

unitTests: TestRunReportReadGatewayServiceTests (run not ready, expired results, successful mapping with recent history).
CoverageCalculatorTests (suite-scoped totals, by-method, by-tag, uncovered paths).
HtmlReportRendererTests (contains summary, coverage, recent history, sanitized details).
TestReportGeneratorTests (renderer selection, storage upload, coverage upsert, metadata create).
GenerateTestReportCommandHandlerTests (owner validation, run ready validation, service invocation).
integrationTests: Optional thin controller tests cho route binding va permission attribute neu repo da co controller auth test pattern.
Optional module wiring test cho renderer registrations neu can.

knownTradeoffs: V1 report generation la synchronous; PDF co the cham hon JSON/CSV/HTML va khong co queue backpressure.
Neu DB save fail sau khi file da upload, file co the bi orphan cho den khi co cleanup strategy rieng; day la tradeoff chap nhan duoc vi Storage contract hien tai chua co delete API.
Coverage trong FE-10 v1 duoc tinh tren suite-scoped endpoints thay vi full specification-wide analytics.
implementationSequence: 3. TestReporting runtime services (sanitizer, coverage, renderers, generator)
